title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a dual-brain AI architecture for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced two humanoids (Dyno and VR-H3) for security, home, factory, and service applications. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor, offering researchers a complete software and hardware stack for humanoid robotics development.
